task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged in as the admin user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the login screen with the username 'admin' entered, or a dashboard/header indicating the active user is an administrator.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent selected the correct patient, Eulalia Hammes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the name 'Eulalia Hammes' (and optionally DOB '1974-04-14') in the patient search results, active patient header, or the appointment scheduling form.

task_completion.description: Verify the appointment reason is set to 'Smoking Cessation Counseling'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Smoking Cessation Counseling' entered into the reason, chief complaint, or visit type field of the appointment scheduling interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the first appointment is scheduled for April 6, 2026, at 09:00 AM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the date '04/06/2026' (or April 6, 2026) and the time '09:00 AM' selected in the date/time fields of the appointment form, or a calendar block on this specific date and time.

task_completion.description: Verify the appointment is set to recur weekly for a total of four appointments.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for recurring schedule settings in the form (e.g., 'Repeat: Weekly', 'Count: 4', or 'End Date' corresponding to 4 weeks), OR look at calendar views showing confirmed appointments on April 13, April 20, and April 27, 2026, at 09:00 AM.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the application's graphical user interface to schedule the appointments.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the web-based EMR scheduling interface (clicking buttons, filling forms) rather than using a terminal or command line.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is interacting with the actual EMR application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be the functional EMR web application, not a text editor, a static mock-up, or a script.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database queries to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows visible showing MySQL 'INSERT' commands or direct database manipulation scripts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Patient: Eulalia Hammes (DOB: 1974-04-14). The schedule must consist of exactly 4 appointments, spaced 7 days apart (weekly). The first appointment must be on 2026-04-06 at 09:00:00. The appointment reason must include the keywords 'smoking', 'cessation', and 'counseling'.
